title: Fix demo black_band_chained.py for V2 API
description: Demo currently fails with ModuleNotFoundError: pypixoo.animation. Migrate black_band_chained.py to current V2 API and verify real-device execution.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Starting fix now. Root cause: demo imports legacy pypixoo.animation API removed in V2.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Fix implemented: migrated demos/black_band_chained.py from removed pypixoo.animation API to V2 native cycle flow (GifSequence + CycleItem + Pixoo.start_cycle). Validation on device: demo starts, loops, and stops cleanly on Ctrl+C.
